exercises.name: TRX Push-Up
exercises.notes: Focus on stability and full range of motion.

exercises.name: TRX Fallout
exercises.notes: Keep core tight, do not let lower back arch.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Raise to Press
exercises.notes: Fluid motion from lateral raise into the press.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck / Rear Delt Flys
Dead Hang Hold
exercises.notes: Finisher Circuit - Round 3/3. Active shoulders if possible.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pulls / Rear Delt Flys
Chest Press - Flat Bench (Dumbbells)
exercises.notes: Superset A1: Heavy, controlled presses for a full chest pump.

exercises.name: Rope Tricep Pushdown
exercises.notes: Superset A2: Keep elbows pinned and squeeze at full extension.

exercises.name: Front-Facing Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Superset B1: Pull to upper chest for lat width.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Superset B2: Smooth tempo, elbows tucked for bicep peak.

exercises.name: Angled Cable Chest Fly (High-to-Low)
exercises.notes: Superset C1: High-to-low path to emphasize lower chest.

exercises.name: Landmine Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Superset C2: Lean slightly forward to light up the delts.

exercises.name: Ab Crunch Machine (Cable or Selectorized)
exercises.notes: Superset D1: Exhale hard at the bottom for core focus.

exercises.name: TRX Fallout
exercises.notes: Superset D2: Keep ribs down and reach long for deep core.

exercises.name: Leg Press (quad bias)
exercises.notes: Feet low and narrow on the platform to bias quads.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (DB/KB)
exercises.notes: Per leg. Keep torso upright for quad focus.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Or Seated/lying leg curl for less low-back fatigue.

exercises.name: Dolphin Scap Push-Ups
exercises.notes: Scapular motion only - controlled retraction (1-2 cm) then strong protraction. Push floor away, ribs down, glutes engaged. Pause 1s at top. Don't bend elbows or arch lower back.

exercises.name: Wall-Facing Forearm Hold (Legs 90°)
exercises.notes: Hold 20-40 seconds. Quality > duration. Stop if lower back starts arching.

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slides
exercises.notes: Forearms on wall, elbows at ~90°. Slide arms up slowly feeling shoulder blades rotate upward. Keep ribs anchored, no back arch. Stop when ribs want to flare or shoulder control degrades.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Mini Hold
exercises.notes: Anti-extension anchor. Lie on back, arms overhead. Exhale fully before lifting to lock ribs down. Lift head and legs slightly, flatten lower back into floor. Regress (bend legs) if lower back lifts.

exercises.name: Dolphin Hold (Structured)
exercises.notes: 15 seconds strong protraction, 10 seconds rest, repeat 3 times. Push forearms down, lift shoulders toward ceiling, ribs down, hips high. Stop if shoulders collapse.

workouts.name: Phase 2 - Workout A (Upper Base + Pincha Support)

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck / Rear Delt Flys

workouts.name: Phase 2 - Workout B (Lower / Posterior Chain / Carry / Trunk)

exercises.name: Reverse Alternating Lunge (Kettlebell)
exercises.notes: 16kg each hand if available, otherwise 16kg total

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slides
exercises.notes: Bodyweight / very light band if needed

workouts.name: Phase 2 - Workout C (Shoulder Stability / Vertical Pattern / Core Integration)

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck / Rear Delt Flys
Cable Face Pulls / Rear Delt Flys

workouts.name: Phase 3 - Workout A (Upper Base + Pincha Support)

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck / Rear Delt Flys

workouts.name: Phase 3 - Workout B (Lower / Posterior Chain / Carry / Trunk)

exercises.name: Reverse Alternating Lunge (Kettlebell)
exercises.notes: 16kg each hand if available, otherwise 16kg total

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slides
exercises.notes: Bodyweight / very light band if needed

workouts.name: Phase 3 - Workout C (Shoulder Stability / Vertical Pattern / Core Integration)

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck / Rear Delt Flys
Cable Face Pulls / Rear Delt Flys

workouts.name: Consolidation A - Upper + Shoulder Quality
workouts.notes: Phase 0 reset. No grinding. Aim: leave the gym feeling better than you arrived.

exercises.name: Pull-Ups
exercises.notes: Easy reps, stop well before failure.

exercises.name: Landmine Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Smooth reps, no push for a top set.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck / Rear Delt Flys

workouts.name: Consolidation B - Lower + Trunk
workouts.notes: Should leave you feeling better afterwards, not depleted.

workouts.name: Phase 1A - Upper Quality + Pincha Support
workouts.notes: Weeks 1-4. RPE 7-8. Clean movement, moderate volume, full range, no failure.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck / Rear Delt Flys
Incline Dumbbell Curls
exercises.notes: Optional if fresh. One arm movement per session, not both.

workouts.name: Phase 1B - Lower Capacity + Carries
workouts.notes: Resist adding upper-body work. Let lower day actually be lower day.

workouts.name: Phase 1C - Shoulder Stability + Trunk Integration
workouts.notes: One arm finisher only, not three.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pulls / Rear Delt Flys
Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Optional. Or cable curls. Pick ONE arm movement, not three.

workouts.name: Phase 2A - Upper Strength
workouts.notes: Weeks 5-8. RPE ~8, leave 1-2 reps in reserve. Longer rests. Fewer exercises. Should feel more focused.

exercises.name: Pull-Ups
exercises.notes: If bodyweight is easy, add slow tempo before added weight.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck / Rear Delt Flys
Cable Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Optional arm finisher. Pick this OR incline curls, not both unless very fresh.

workouts.name: Phase 2B - Lower Strength + Carry
workouts.notes: Careful not to add pull-ups, push-ups, curls, extra chest. Let lower day be lower day.

workouts.name: Phase 2C - Pull / Shoulder Density
workouts.notes: Keeps vertical/pulling/shoulder theme, trims accessory sprawl.

exercises.name: Pull-Ups
exercises.notes: Or 5x5 if you want a different strength feel.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pulls / Rear Delt Flys

workouts.name: Phase 3A - Pincha Strength + Upper Control
workouts.notes: Weeks 9-12. Not a bodybuilding upper day - shoulder/trunk architecture. Moderate loads, crisp, controlled.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck / Rear Delt Flys

workouts.name: Phase 3B - Mobility Strength + Lower Control
workouts.notes: Goal is not to crush posterior chain. Build lower-body control, tissue tolerance, trunk integrity.

exercises.name: Farmers Carry (Kettlebell)
exercises.notes: Or suitcase carry (one KB at a time).

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Hanging knee raise if straight-leg is too much.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pulls / Rear Delt Flys

workouts.name: Week 13 - Deload & Test Markers
workouts.notes: Not a max-out week. Two lighter sessions plus markers. Test quality, not maxes.

exercises.name: Pull-Ups
exercises.notes: One clean set, stop before ugly reps.

exercises.name: Chest Press - Flat Bench (Dumbbells)
exercises.notes: Clean reps only. Not a max attempt.

workouts.name: On the Rack with Ben
workouts.notes: Rack + TRX + bar session designed for training with Ben. Progresses through warm-up, pull/push supersets, shoulder-health work, direct arms, and a core finisher. Clean reps, no death marches.

exercises.name: Scapular Pull-Up
exercises.notes: Warm-up. Hang from bar, arms straight, pull shoulders down away from ears then relax.

exercises.name: TRX Low Row
exercises.notes: Warm-up. Easy angle. Wake up lats, rear delts, mid-back.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Up
exercises.notes: Warm-up. Hands on bar or rack upright. Controlled.

exercises.name: TRX Y-Raise
exercises.notes: Warm-up. Light angle. Move shoulder blades cleanly, don't force range.

exercises.name: Pull-Ups
exercises.notes: Superset A1 with dips. Ben: band-assisted, jumping negatives, or TRX-assisted if bodyweight is too hard.

exercises.name: Dips
exercises.notes: Superset A2 with pull-ups. Rest 60-90s between supersets. If shoulder-aggressive: feet-assisted, slow eccentric, or TRX push-ups instead.

exercises.name: TRX Low Row
exercises.notes: Superset B1 with pike push-ups. Feet-forward for harder angle. Chest to handles, elbows tucked, shoulder blades back and down, no hip sag.

exercises.name: Pike Push-Up
exercises.notes: Superset B2. Rack-supported for easier version, feet elevated for harder. Slow 3s eccentric option is very controlled.

exercises.name: TRX Face Pull
exercises.notes: Shoulder-health round. Pull handles toward forehead. Elbows high. Slight rotation at the end.

exercises.name: TRX Y-Raise
exercises.notes: Shoulder-health round. Light, controlled. Don't turn it into a lower-back extension.

exercises.name: Dolphin Scap Push-Ups
exercises.notes: Shoulder-health round. Very pincha-relevant. Forearms down, hips slightly up, push floor away then allow blades to move back.

exercises.name: Wall-Facing Forearm Hold
exercises.notes: Shoulder-health round finisher. Only if surface + space are genuinely safe. Otherwise: forearm plank with active scap protraction.

exercises.name: TRX Biceps Curl
exercises.notes: Superset D1. Lean back, arms straight, palms up, curl handles toward forehead. Harder by walking feet forward.

exercises.name: TRX Triceps Press
exercises.notes: Superset D2. Face away from anchor, elbows high, bend then extend. Ribs down, glutes on, elbows fixed. Don't turn into a press.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Core round. Hanging knee raise if straight-leg too much. Or captain's chair variant if grip fades.

exercises.name: TRX Fallout
exercises.notes: Core round. Ab-wheel pattern. Ribs down, glutes on, don't let lower back sag.

exercises.name: TRX Body Saw
exercises.notes: Core round. Forearms on ground, feet in TRX if possible. Otherwise plank saw on forearms.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.notes: Core round finisher. Anti-extension + anterior core + obliques.

collections.name: Consolidation
collections.description: Phase 0 reset week. Reduce fatigue, tidy technique, prepare for Phase 1.

collections.name: Phase 1 - Capacity
collections.description: Weeks 1-4. Clean movement, moderate volume, RPE 7-8. Add reps first, then small load bumps.

collections.name: Phase 2 - Strength
collections.description: Weeks 5-8. Heavier work, fewer exercises, longer rests, RPE ~8.

collections.name: Phase 3 - Athletic
collections.description: Weeks 9-12. Convert strength into usable body control. Yoga/pincha/trunk integration.

collections.name: Week 13 - Deload/Test
collections.description: Two lighter sessions plus test markers. Check progress without maxing out.

collections.name: Ben Sessions
collections.description: Sessions built for training with Ben. Rack + TRX + bodyweight focus.
